steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: Parallel shortcut: equal slopes. The given line $y = 7x + 4$ has slope $7$, so our line also has slope $7$.

steps.title: Plug in the point (0, 5) to find the equation
steps.content: Slope $7$, y-intercept at $(0, 5)$: $y = 7x + 5$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
